extra.reason: Resolved: ccusage backend, related wiring, dead multi-agent plumbing, compare_usage.swift script, and stale README documentation are removed; app code no longer references ccusage.

Resolved: blog/session usage aggregation now computes provider-aware cost_usd via ModelPricing for Anthropic and OpenAI models, with regression coverage for Codex auto-review, GPT 5.5 fast, Anthropic pricing, and unknown model behavior.
Provider enum, UsageWindowType codex cases, ProviderUsageSnapshot, TokenCount.reasoningTokens implemented; Kit builds clean

Live multi-provider token/cost done: UsageLogSource protocol, CodexLogSource, OpenCodeLogSource (SQLite), TokenUsageService aggregator with provider-aware cost + byProvider, auto-detect wiring. macOS+widgets build clean. SwiftData persistence split to follow-up.

CodexUsageService reads 5h/weekly rate-limit windows from newest rollout (used_percent/resets_at/plan_type) → ProviderUsageSnapshot. Verified vs real data: plan prolite, 5h 51%, 7d 20%. macOS builds clean.
Live multi-provider token/cost aggregator shipped (re-confirming closed).
Auto-detect wiring + Codex menu-bar toggle done; full enable/disable settings optional.
OpenUsage-style provider cards shipped on macOS (popover + dashboard). iOS/widgets → ClaudeMeter-d01.

OpenUsage-style sidebar + ProviderDetailView shipped (popover + dashboard): rail switches overview/per-provider; detail shows links, windows w/ status dots, Today/Yesterday/30d, usage-trend sparkline (bars), per-model %. Builds clean (macOS+widgets). Spark/Credits omitted (not in local logs).
Expired Codex rate-limit windows now refresh to zero usage and roll their reset timestamp forward; added focused Codex usage service tests. App build succeeds.

Compared against CodexBar, OpenUsage, upstream Codex, abtop, and local Codex rollout logs. Updated parser to map windows by window_minutes, support reset_at/reset_after_seconds variants, and added coverage for these cases. App build succeeds; test target remains blocked by stale OutageTrackingTests.
Verified OpenCode Go dashboard quota behavior and added optional dashboard parser/service integration.
